modules.name: AI Agents
modules.description: Agent registry, tool registry, agent memory links, task queue/execution records. Designed for MCP tool calling.

module.name: AI Agents
module.description: Agent registry, tool registry, agent memory links, task queue/execution records. Designed for MCP tool calling.

entities.name: tool
entities.description: Callable tools. For MCP, these map to MCP tool definitions.

entities.name: agent
entities.description: Agent configuration: instructions, model defaults, safety policy tags, tool access.

entities.name: agent_tool
entities.description: Tool allowlist per agent.

entities.name: agent_memory_item
entities.description: Long-term memory pointers for agents. Store content + optional embedding target link.

entities.name: agent_task
entities.description: Task queue. Tasks can be created by rules/workflows/events. Worker executes them via tools.

entities.name: agent_task_step
entities.description: Per-tool-call record for the task. Links to ai_runs for consistent observability.

modules.name: AI Core
modules.description: AI run tracking, embeddings store, feedback loop, AI suggestions. Designed to attach to any entity via (entity_type, entity_id).

module.name: AI Core
module.description: AI run tracking, embeddings store, feedback loop, AI suggestions. Designed to attach to any entity via (entity_type, entity_id).

attach_points.name: ai.embedding_target
attach_points.description: Any entity can declare this attach point; the generator uses embeddings(entity_type, entity_id).

modules.name: Automation Integrations
modules.description: Integration registry: connectors, credentials, inbound webhooks, outbound HTTP actions (safe templating).

module.name: Automation Integrations
module.description: Integration registry: connectors, credentials, inbound webhooks, outbound HTTP actions (safe templating).

entities.name: connector
entities.description: Connector types (Slack, Gmail, Stripe, GitHub).

entities.name: credential
entities.description: Stored auth material (token, apiKey). Store encrypted blob in secret_json.

entities.name: inbound_webhook
entities.description: Public webhook endpoints that emit events into core.events.

entities.name: http_action_template
entities.description: Reusable outbound HTTP call template used by automation.rules actions.

modules.name: Automation Rules
modules.description: Event-driven rules: triggers, conditions, actions, executions. Works with core.events and can call AI via ai.core.

module.name: Automation Rules
module.description: Event-driven rules: triggers, conditions, actions, executions. Works with core.events and can call AI via ai.core.

entities.name: rule
entities.description: High-level automation rule triggered by an event_name.

entities.name: rule_condition
entities.description: ANDed conditions evaluated against event payload/context.

entities.name: rule_action
entities.description: Ordered actions to execute if conditions pass.

fields.name: config_json
fields.description: Executor-specific config; may reference event fields with templating.

entities.name: rule_execution
entities.description: An instance of a rule run for a specific event.

entities.name: rule_execution_step
entities.description: Per-action execution log for debugging and replay.

entities.name: dead_letter
entities.description: Failed executions after max attempts; keep payload for diagnosis/retry.

modules.name: Automation Scheduler
modules.description: Scheduled jobs (cron/interval) that emit events and/or run actions. Enables time-based automation.

module.name: Automation Scheduler
module.description: Scheduled jobs (cron/interval) that emit events and/or run actions. Enables time-based automation.

fields.name: event_id
fields.description: If this run emitted an event.

modules.name: Automation Workflow
modules.description: State machine workflows, instances, triggers, and actions. Subscribes to events to drive automation.

module.name: Automation Workflow
module.description: State machine workflows, instances, triggers, and actions. Subscribes to events to drive automation.

entities.name: workflow_instance
entities.description: A workflow applied to an entity (entity_type/entity_id).

prompts.purpose: Suggest next state / assignee based on context

entities.name: workflow_trigger
entities.description: Subscribes a workflow to an event name (e.g., 'order.created').

entities.name: workflow_action
entities.description: Actions executed on transition/state entry, including webhooks, DB updates, or AI calls.

entities.name: user
entities.description: Human user account.

entities.name: organization
entities.description: Tenant / workspace. Optional if you run single-tenant apps.

entities.name: membership
entities.description: Links users to organizations with a membership status.

entities.name: role
entities.description: Named role (RBAC). Scope can be org-wide or global depending on multi_tenant.

entities.name: permission
entities.description: Atomic permission key (RBAC).

entities.name: role_permission
entities.description: Join table for role -> permission.

entities.name: user_role
entities.description: Assign role to a user (optionally scoped to org).
